p2p_enrich.notes: Added 5 pass_to_pass tests from VS Code CI/CD: (1) npm run compile-check-ts-native - TypeScript typecheck via native tsgo compiler, (2) npm run monaco-compile-check - Monaco editor typecheck, (3) npm run vscode-dts-compile-check - VS Code dts typecheck, (4) npm run precommit - Hygiene checks (copyright headers, formatting), (5) ESLint on modified files (actionList.ts, sessionWorkspacePicker.ts). Skipped: gulp tests (need full build), tsc (OOM), valid-layers-check (OOM), test-node/unit tests (need transpilation). VERIFIED: All 5 repo_tests pass at base commit.

validate.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py escaping issues: (1) regex pattern had double-escaped backslashes r'if\s*...' should be r'if\s*...', (2) tab check used '\t' literal instead of '	' actual tab character. Also simplified rubric rules in eval_manifest.yaml - removed two rules about string externalization that didn't apply to this structural code fix (no new user-visible strings added).
